import{j as e}from"./index-BrdSe0CA.js";import"./charts-7pOQm6Mk.js";import"./documents-Bhnlew-O.js";function J({runtime:k}){const{vouchers:b,voucherSearch:j,customers:c,suppliers:x,voucherTypeFilter:m,Receipt:T,language:s,Plus:P,handleCreateVoucher:E,setNewVoucherType:w,setNewVoucherPartyType:f,setNewVoucherPartyId:n,newVoucherType:p,newVoucherPartyType:g,newVoucherPartyId:v,partySearchQuery:h,setPartySearchQuery:d,Search:y,newVoucherAmount:S,setNewVoucherAmount:R,newVoucherDate:V,setNewVoucherDate:I,setNewVoucherMethod:$,newVoucherMethod:L,newVoucherCreator:A,setNewVoucherCreator:M,newVoucherNotes:U,setNewVoucherNotes:F,setVoucherSearch:O,setVoucherTypeFilter:q,isRtl:B,openCustomerProfile:Q,openSupplierProfile:D,setActiveVoucherReceipt:H,playBeep:Y}=k;return(()=>{const C=b.filter(t=>{var o,i;const a=j.toLowerCase();let r=!0;if(a){let u="";t.partyType==="CUSTOMER"?u=((o=c.find(N=>N.id===t.partyId))==null?void 0:o.name)||"":t.partyType==="SUPPLIER"?u=((i=x.find(N=>N.id===t.partyId))==null?void t=c.find(r=>r.id===v),a=c.filter(r=>{const l=h.toLowerCase().trim();return l?r.name.toLowerCase().includes(l)||r.phone&&r.phone.includes(l):!0});return e.jsxs("div",{className:"space-y-2 $${t.balance.toFixed(2)}`}),t.phone&&e.jsxs("span",{className:"font-mono",children:["| ",t.phone]})]})]}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{n(""),d("")},className:"bg-white hover:bg-teal-100 $${(t.balance||0).toFixed(2)}`}),t.phone&&e.jsxs("span",{className:"font-mono",children:["| ",t.phone]})]})]}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{n(""),d("")},className:"bg-white 🔄"})]}):e.jsxs("div",{className:"space-y-1.5",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"relative",children:[e.jsx(y,{className:"absolute left-2.5 top-2.5 w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-400 *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"date",required:!0,value:V,onChange:t=>I(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 font-bold shrink-0"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:s==="ar"?"البحث بالاسم، السند، أو الملاحظات...":"Search by party, voucher #...",value:j,onChange:t=>O(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 pl-9 pr-3 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500"})]}),e.jsx("div",{className:"flex gap-1.5 shrink-0",children:[{key:"ALL",label:s==="ar"?"الكل":"All"},{key:"RECEIPT",label:s==="ar"?"القبض":"Receipts"},{key:"PAYMENT",label:s==="ar"?"الصرف":"Payments"}].map(t=>e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>q(t.key),className:`px-3 السداد":"Payment"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"p-3 text-center",children:s==="ar"?"التحكم":"Action"})]})}),e.jsx("tbody",{className:"divide-y divide-slate-100 font-medium",children:C.length===0?e.jsx("tr",{children:e.jsx("td",{colSpan:6,className:"p-8 text-center text-slate-400 italic",children:s==="ar"?"لا يوجد سندات مالية مسجلة تتطابق مع البحث":"No recorded financial vouchers found."})}):C.map(t=>{var r,l;let a="";return t.partyType==="CUSTOMER"?a=`👤 ${((r=c.find(o=>o.id===t.partyId))==null?void 0:r.name)||(s==="ar"?"عميل غير معروف":"Unknown Customer")}`:t.partyType==="SUPPLIER"?a=`🏢 ${((l=x.find(o=>o.id===t.partyId))==null?void 0:l.name)||(s==="ar"?"مورد غير معروف":"Unknown Supplier")}`:a=`⚙️ ${s==="ar"?"أخرى / عامة":"Other General"}`,e.jsxs("tr",{className:"hover:bg-slate-50/50 transition",children:[e.jsx("td",{className:"p-3 font-mono font-bold text-slate-700",children:t.voucherNumber}),e.jsx("td",{className:"p-3 truncate max-w-[150px]",title:a,children:t.partyType==="CUSTOMER"&&t.partyId?e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{const o=c.find(i=>i.id===t.partyId);o&&Q(o)},className:"font-bold text-teal-650 hover:text-teal-800 hover:underline text-left cursor-pointer outline-none bg-transparent border-0 p-0",children:a}):t.partyType==="SUPPLIER"&&t.partyId?e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{const o=x.find(i=>i.id===t.partyId);o&&D(o)},className:"font-bold text-indigo-650 hover:text-indigo-800 hover:underline text-left cursor-pointer outline-none bg-transparent border-0 p-0",children:a}):e.jsx("span",{className:"text-slate-850 font-bold",children:a})}),e.jsx("td",{className:"p-3 text-slate-450",children:t.date}),e.jsx("td",{className:"p-3",children:e.jsxs("span",{className:`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md font-mono font-bold text-xs ${t.type==="RECEIPT"?"bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700":"bg-rose-50 text-rose-700"}`,children:[t.type==="RECEIPT"?"+":"-","$",t.amount.toFixed(2)]})}),e.jsx("td",{className:"p-3",children:e.jsx("span",{className:"bg-slate-100 text-slate-650 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider",children:t.paymentMethod})}),e.jsx("td",{className:"p-3 text-center",children:e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{H(t),Y("click")},className:"bg-indigo-50 hover:bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700 font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-xl text-[10px] transition cursor-pointer",children:s==="ar"?"عرض السند وإيصال الطباعة 🖨️":"View Receipt 🖨️"})})]},t.id)})})]})})})]})]})]})})()}export{J as VouchersScreen};
